heading: Petition of the Government for modification or remission
label: 3573 Petition of the Government for modification or remission
notes: Prior ProvisionsFor a prior section 3573, applicable to offenses committed prior to , see note set out preceding .Nov. 1, 1987section 3551 of this title

Amendments1988— inserted at end “This section shall apply to all fines and assessments irrespective of the date of imposition.”Pub. L. 100–6901987— substituted “Petition of the Government for modification or remission” for “Modification or remission of fine” in section catchline and amended text generally, revising and restating as a single paragraph with three numbered clauses provisions formerly contained in subsecs. (a) and (b).Pub. L. 100–185

Effective DateSection effective , and applicable only to offenses committed after the taking effect of this section, see , set out as a note under .Nov. 1, 1987section 235(a)(1) of Pub. L. 98–473section 3551 of this title
amendments: Amendments1988— inserted at end “This section shall apply to all fines and assessments irrespective of the date of imposition.”Pub. L. 100–6901987— substituted “Petition of the Government for modification or remission” for “Modification or remission of fine” in section catchline and amended text generally, revising and restating as a single paragraph with three numbered clauses provisions formerly contained in subsecs. children.text: remit all or part of the unpaid portion of the fine or special assessment, including interest and penalties;
defer payment of the fine or special assessment to a date certain or pursuant to an installment schedule; or
extend a date certain or an installment schedule previously ordered.
